top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Poised to Gain as AI Rally Extends: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks were set to track Wall Street higher as renewed enthusiasm for the artificial-intelligence trade drove the S&P 500 to a ninth day of gains. Oil steadied as conflicting signals clouded the outlook for a US-Iran deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Russia claims foreign spy agencies hacked officials' phones
top_signals.summary: In a statement, Russia's Federal Security Service (FSB) said it had uncovered what it described as a "large-scale operation" involving malicious software installed on the mobile devices of senior Russian officials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: DNV Launches V2 of Steel Load Planner
top_signals.summary: Classification society DNV released version 2 of its Steel Load Planner (SLP V2.0) self-service application at the Posidonia trade fair this week. Steel coils are one of the staple minor-bulk cargoes, yet remain among the most demanding to plan…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin faces an 'identity crisis' and DeFi devs need to stop acting like tech bros
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix ascends as new memory king with high-bandwidth AI chips
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
